sections.title: Geographic Location and Area
paragraphs: Amman is located in northern Jordan on the Amman mountain range and is the political and economic capital of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan.
The city extends over more than 750 square kilometers and includes hillside neighborhoods that reflect its distinctive urban character.
Amman enjoys a strategic location in the heart of the Levant and serves as a regional hub for business and services.

cta.title: Help Build Better Arab Cities
cta.description: Join a network of municipalities, researchers, and practitioners in a pioneering experience
